# DigiStorms

> AI agent for onboarding emails. Analyzes your product, maps the user journey, and builds a full lifecycle email system — automatically.

## What is DigiStorms?

DigiStorms is an AI-powered SaaS tool that generates behavior-based onboarding and lifecycle email sequences. Instead of manually writing emails or guessing what to send, DigiStorms analyzes your product to understand how users reach value, then creates a complete email system tailored to your onboarding journey. It triggers messages based on real user behavior, not fixed schedules, so users get the right message at the right time.

## Who is it for?

- SaaS founders who want higher activation and free-to-paid conversion
- Growth and product teams tired of building onboarding flows manually
- Companies that know lifecycle email = revenue

## Key capabilities

- Analyzes your website to understand your product and user journey
- Generates complete onboarding email sequences (welcome, activation, milestone, upgrade, win-back)
- Triggers emails based on real user behavior, not fixed schedules
- Trained on 1,058 real SaaS lifecycle emails from companies like Notion, Slack, Stripe, Adobe
- Includes an email library with 1,058 B2B SaaS lifecycle email examples from 39 top companies

## Pricing

- Free: $0/month for 100 new signups
- Pro: $19/month for 1,000 new signups
- Business: $59/month for 5,000 new signups
- Scale: $149/month for 10,000 new signups
- Concierge (done-for-you): custom pricing

## Founded by

Jonathan Bernard (https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonathan-digistorms/) — lifecycle email specialist for SaaS companies. Previously consulted with growth teams on onboarding, retention, and expansion strategy.

## Email Library

The DigiStorms Email Library contains 1,058 lifecycle emails from 39 B2B SaaS companies, organized by 80 email types (tags) and 9 use case categories. Browse the full library at https://www.digistorms.ai/library

### Brands (39)

- [Adobe](https://www.digistorms.ai/library/brand/adobe) — 25 emails

## Optional

### Blog Articles

- [12 onboarding email examples from real SaaS brands (2026)](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/saas-onboarding-email-sequence) — The 7-email onboarding sequence with subject lines, timing, and patterns from Loom, Calendly, Pipedrive, Asana, Stripe, Zapier, and Monday. Published May 25, 2026.
- [Behavior-based vs time-based emails: 2026 SaaS guide](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/behavior-based-vs-time-based-emails) — 10 real behavioral emails grouped by milestone, feature-usage, and inactivity triggers. From Loom, Zapier, Apollo, Calendly, Jira. Published May 22, 2026.
- [12 upsell email examples from real SaaS companies (2026)](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/upsell-email-examples) — Real upsell emails from Semrush, Hunter, Zapier, Loom, and Typeform with subject lines and triggers. Published May 18, 2026.
- [Welcome email templates: 28 SaaS examples to copy](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/saas-welcome-email) — Best practices, timing tips, and real examples to level up your day-0 onboarding email.
- [12 customer retention email examples (real SaaS, 2026)](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/customer-retention-email-examples) — 12 retention emails from Adobe, Semrush, Dropbox, Notion, Grammarly, Mailchimp — milestone, inactivity, expansion, and win-back patterns. Published May 11, 2026.
- [SaaS email benchmarks: what 1,058 lifecycle emails reveal](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/saas-email-benchmarks) — Original research analyzing 1,058 lifecycle emails from 39 top SaaS companies. Published April 7, 2026.
- [14 SaaS lifecycle email templates you can steal (2026)](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/saas-email-templates) — 14 ready-to-use templates covering welcome, setup, education, milestone, trial-ending, upgrade, and reactivation.
- [28 product launch email examples from real SaaS (2026)](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/product-launch-email) — Real product launch and release emails from Notion, Slack, ClickUp, Asana, Webflow, Loom, and Figma.
- [30 product launch email subject lines (real SaaS, 2026)](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/product-launch-email-subject-lines) — Real product launch subject lines from Notion, Loom, Linear, Zapier and more.
- [15 B2B lead nurturing email examples from real SaaS](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/b2b-lead-nurturing-email-examples) — Real B2B lead nurturing emails from Apollo, Notion, Ahrefs, Calendly, Asana, and ClickUp.
- [12 re-engagement email examples that win back inactive users (2026)](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/re-engagement-email-examples) — Real win-back and re-engagement emails from Adobe, Canva, Apollo, Semrush, and Pipedrive.
- [Transactional vs marketing email: 2026 SaaS guide](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/transactional-email-vs-marketing-email) — Side-by-side comparison with real examples from Stripe, Calendly, Notion, Beehiiv, and Zapier.
- [15 SaaS newsletter examples that grow your subscribers](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/saas-newsletter) — 15 real SaaS newsletters with subject lines, cadence, and the structural choices that drive opens and clicks.
- [25 webinar email examples: full 7-email sequence (2026)](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/webinar-email-sequence) — High-converting webinar email sequences from Customer.io, Slack, HubSpot, Calendly.
- [13 webinar follow-up email examples (with subject lines)](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/webinar-follow-up-email) — Effective webinar follow-up emails with smart segmentation and tips.
- [25 webinar follow up subject lines that get opened](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/webinar-follow-up-subject-lines) — Real subject lines organized by audience type, attendance status, and timing.
- [12 SaaS milestone email examples that drive retention](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/milestone-emails) — How to create milestone emails that drive engagement and retention.
- [13 upgrade email examples that convert free users (2026)](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/upgrade-emails) — Upgrade emails that convert trial users into paying customers.
- [8 dunning email examples that recover failed payments](https://www.digistorms.ai/blog/dunning-emails) — Dunning emails that recover failed payments and reduce involuntary churn.

### Comparison Pages

- [DigiStorms vs Customer.io](https://www.digistorms.ai/compare/digistorms-vs-customer-io) — Side-by-side comparison for SaaS onboarding emails.
- [DigiStorms vs Encharge](https://www.digistorms.ai/compare/digistorms-vs-encharge) — Behavior-based onboarding email tools compared.
- [DigiStorms vs Loops](https://www.digistorms.ai/compare/digistorms-vs-loops) — AI-generated onboarding sequences vs. modern SaaS email platform.
- [DigiStorms vs Resend: AI onboarding vs email API](https://www.digistorms.ai/compare/digistorms-vs-resend) — AI onboarding agent vs. developer email API for SaaS.
- [Best onboarding email tools for SaaS](https://www.digistorms.ai/compare/best-onboarding-email-tools) — Roundup of lifecycle email tools picked for SaaS onboarding.
- [Best email automation for SaaS startups](https://www.digistorms.ai/compare/best-email-automation-saas-startups) — 8 email automation tools picked for free tiers and fast setup.
- [5 best Customer.io alternatives for SaaS (from $0)](https://www.digistorms.ai/compare/customer-io-alternatives) — Affordable Customer.io alternatives: DigiStorms, Encharge, Loops, Userlist, Sequenzy.
